### How to merge
All commits to main must be signed. It is recommended to merge via the GitHub GUI.
#### Review
Every pull request needs to be reviewed and approved by one person.
#### Merge conflicts
If there is a merge conflict:
1. Merge `main` into YOUR branch locally.
2. Resolve the conflicts and commit.
3. Push your branch updates to this PR.
